name: Quick Coconut Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 box small one-layer white cake mix (or 1/2 of a 2-layer cake mix, about 2 cups)
1 cup mixed nuts (e.g., almonds and walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In the baking pan, melt butter and tilt to coat the bottom with butter.
3. Sprinkle the dry cake mix evenly over the melted butter.
4. Sprinkle marshmallows, chocolate chips, shredded coconut, and mixed nuts on top of the cake mix.
5. Pour sweetened condensed milk evenly over the top.
6. Bake for about 30 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Run a knife around the edges to loosen the bars from the pan.
8. Allow to cool completely.
9. Cut into bars measuring approximately 1 1/2 by 1 inch.
10. Makes 6 dozen bars.
